assertions.evidence: Document starts with 'User Pain Points Analysis' and 'Business Value Proposition' before any technical discussion
Explicitly uses PDD Value Score formula: Value Score = (User Value x 0.4) + (Business Value x 0.4) + (Technical Value x 0.2)
Defines quantifiable metrics: Dashboard DAU penetration 30%, Session duration +2 min, Feature adoption 50%, NPS +5 points, Retention +10%
Section 6.1 includes MVP feature prioritization with Priority/Effort/Value columns and explicit Include in MVP decisions
